moments.title: World Cup 2026 Action Continues
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is in full swing across North America, with group stage matches and knockout rounds captivating football fans worldwide until July 19.

angles.name: Match Day Hype
angles.copy: More World Cup action today! Who are you backing to make it through to the next round? #FIFAWorldCup

angles.name: Tournament Buzz
angles.copy: The biggest football tournament on the planet is dominating screens. Any upsets caught your eye so far at the World Cup 2026?

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Underway
moments.blurb: The Championships, Wimbledon, are ongoing at the All England Club, running from June 29 to July 12, with top players battling it out on the grass courts.

angles.name: Tennis Fever
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 is serving up some incredible tennis this week. Who's your pick for the title?

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Any big shocks or standout performances from the British players at Wimbledon so far? Catch all the action live!

moments.title: F1 British Grand Prix This Sunday
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 British Grand Prix is set to electrify Silverstone this Sunday, July 5th, attracting motorsport enthusiasts from around the globe.

angles.name: Race Weekend Anticipation
angles.copy: Get ready for the roar! The British Grand Prix is this Sunday at Silverstone. Who's going to take the checkered flag?

angles.name: Silverstone Showdown
angles.copy: All eyes on Silverstone this weekend for the British Grand Prix. Will we see a new winner or a dominant performance?

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama Continues
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, which began on June 1st, is providing daily dose of sun, romance, and drama from the Mallorca villa.

angles.name: Villa Gossip
angles.copy: Another day, another dose of drama in the Love Island villa! What's got everyone talking from last night's episode?

angles.name: Coupling Predictions
angles.copy: Who's cracking on and who's on the rocks? Your Love Island predictions for the next recoupling are in!

moments.title: New UK Singles Chart Tomorrow
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart will be updated tomorrow, July 3rd, revealing the nation's new number one and top tracks.

angles.name: Chart Countdown
angles.copy: New music Friday means a new Official UK Singles Chart! Who do you think will be crowned number one tomorrow?

angles.name: Who's Top?
angles.copy: Will the current Number 1 hold on, or is there a new challenger for the top spot? Find out in tomorrow's UK Singles Chart!

moments.title: Happy 46th to Michelle Branch
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Michelle Branch, known for hits like 'Everywhere' and 'Are You Happy Now?', celebrates her 46th birthday today.

angles.name: Celebrating Michelle
angles.copy: Sending 46th birthday wishes to the brilliant Michelle Branch! What's your favourite track from her awesome career?

moments.title: Vince Clarke Turns 66
moments.blurb: Tomorrow, July 3rd, marks the 66th birthday of electronic music pioneer Vince Clarke, co-founder of Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure.

angles.name: Synth Pop Icon
angles.copy: Happy 66th birthday to the legendary Vince Clarke tomorrow! From Depeche Mode to Erasure, his synth-pop influence is undeniable. Which project is your favourite?

moments.title: Post Malone Turns 31
moments.blurb: On Saturday, July 4th, chart-topping artist Post Malone, known for his genre-blending hits, celebrates his 31st birthday.

angles.name: Celebrating Posty
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 31st birthday to Post Malone this Saturday! What's your go-to Posty anthem?

moments.title: Huey Lewis is 76
moments.blurb: Legendary singer Huey Lewis of Huey Lewis and the News, famous for 'The Power of Love,' turns 76 on Sunday, July 5th.

angles.name: Huey's Big Day
angles.copy: It's the heart of rock and roll! Happy 76th birthday to the iconic Huey Lewis this Sunday! What's your favourite Huey Lewis and the News track?

moments.title: 50 Cent Turns 51
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, actor, and businessman 50 Cent (Curtis Jackson) celebrates his 51st birthday on Monday, July 6th.

angles.name: Go Shorty, It's Your Birthday
angles.copy: Go Shorty, it's his birthday! Wishing 50 Cent a very happy 51st on Monday! What's your favourite track from the rap legend?

moments.title: Ringo Starr's 86th Birthday
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, will celebrate his 86th birthday on Tuesday, July 7th.

angles.name: Fab Four Drummer
angles.copy: All we need is love... and a happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr this Tuesday! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo?

moments.title: Beck Turns 56
moments.blurb: Eclectic and innovative musician Beck, known for hits like 'Loser' and 'Where It's At', celebrates his 56th birthday on Wednesday, July 8th.

angles.name: Celebrating Beck
angles.copy: Happy 56th birthday to the incredibly talented Beck this Wednesday! Which of his genre-bending tracks is your all-time favourite?

moments.title: Courtney Love is 62
moments.blurb: Iconic Hole frontwoman and actress Courtney Love celebrates her 62nd birthday on Thursday, July 9th.

angles.name: Rock Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 62nd birthday to the fierce and fabulous Courtney Love this Thursday! What's your favourite Hole track or Courtney moment?

moments.title: Jack White Turns 51
moments.blurb: The prolific rock musician and producer Jack White, best known for The White Stripes, turns 51 on Thursday, July 9th.

angles.name: Celebrating Jack White
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 51st birthday to the incredible Jack White this Thursday! What's your favourite project or song from the rock polymath?
